company_type: Elevator and Escalator Manufacturing, Installation and Service

dependencies: Reliance on approximately 450 key suppliers for manufacturing supply chain
Some components or applications require particular specifications or qualifications with single supplier or limited number of suppliers
Diverse network of several thousand suppliers globally
risks: Supply constraints or cost pressures due to single supplier or limited suppliers for certain components
High prices for important raw materials causing margin and cost pressures
Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical conflicts

regulatory_risks: Changes in legislation or government policies impacting the industry (employee safety, labor-related regulations, industrial equipment, licensing requirements, foreign ownership limitations, building and elevator safety codes)
Environmental regulations for cleanup of pollutants
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and other anti-corruption laws violations
Mandatory supply laws and bidding regulations
Export control regulations (Export Administration Regulations, embargoes and sanctions)
Data privacy and cybersecurity laws compliance
Income tax regulations and changes to tax laws
Climate change legislation and regulatory rules
Government enforcement actions for data privacy and cybersecurity violations
Penalties for non-compliance under applicable laws
Changes in U.S. administration policies and priorities affecting tax, environmental, regulatory matters
Trade policies, tariffs and trade barriers changes

sanction_risks: Restrictions on transfer of funds to and from Russia
Export controls and sanctions administered by U.S. Department of Treasury
U.S. foreign policy restrictions on business dealings with certain individuals, entities or countries
